meaning: Remote Data Objects,远程数据对象
examples: These classes do not include all of RDO or ADO, but rather represent internal objects declared in the type library.
ADO mostly includes RDO-style functionality to interact with OLE DB data sources, plus remoting and DHTML technology.
While ADO encapsulates the functionality of DAO and RDO, you must convert many of the language elements over to ADO syntax.
